translation.literal_translation: And as in the case of 'mahat.' (7)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.7: avyakta cannot be forced to mean Sankhya pradhana, by the same reasoning used for terms like mahat whose Vedic denotation is contextually different.
translation.interpretive_note: Compressed analogy-sutra: lexical transfer from Sankhya to Vedanta is not automatic.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: This sutra depends on the immediately preceding lexical argument for full force.
Literal keeps minimal style; technical line expands argumentative import.
